episodes.title: I tracked down the thief who stole $200,000 of LEGO
episodes.description: I got an email from a fan saying their dad had spent his entire life collecting Star Wars lego sets, and now it's known to be the world's largest Star Wars lego collection ever worth around $200,000.  However, the entire thing got stolen from him by a lego company called "Bricks and Minifigs."  We basically try to nicely ask for his property back, and they said no, so it looks like we have to get it back the hard way! Enjoy!

episodes.title: The cult killed my girlfriend
episodes.description:
Because this cult doesn't believe in medicine, they literally killed my girlfriend... or at least that's what I'm telling them.  And through it, I see how them treating others like this has caused unnecessary deaths in their communities. Anyways, instead of comforting me when I told them Lydia was dead, they basically told me that I was wrong for leaving her and it's good she's dead now because one time she had a gay thought. Anyways, to get my job back and regain their trust, I went along with their story to build up trust for some crazy episodes to come!

episodes.title: Scientology actually brainwashed me
episodes.description:
Help support me on Patreon! https://www.patreon.com/c/RecklessBen

(Part 4 of 10) "The World's Best Scientology Documentary Ever"
(New episode every Monday)


When I first went into Scientology, they said they would give me a free audit. The first 3 episodes were them procrastinating, but in this episode, it finally happens. It turns out that the audit is just their key way of brainwashing people. Even as an extreme skeptic myself, their brainwashing technique worked on me and my memory of when I broke my neck is now very foggy of what really happened that day. When talking to some other Scientologists afterward, it turns out that they use these same techniques to get you to believe the Xenu story. This is the structure of how Scientology works. In the end, I ended up not fully getting out of one of my past lives as a T-Rex, which happened at one of the worst possible times: in a college lecture hall. Michael was able to save me from this embarrassing moment by using some ancient Scientology techniques which took thousands of years to develop and perfect.

Follow Us on Insta:
@RecklessBenSchneider (Ben)
@Fortnerdm (Michael) 


https://ultramegarad.pollenly.com/recklessbenschneider is the link to the awesome sweatshirt I'm wearing in this video!

episodes.title: I secretly recorded inside scientology for 3 weeks
episodes.description:
Help support me on Patreon! https://www.patreon.com/c/RecklessBen

(Part 2 of 10) of "The World's Best Scientology Documentary Ever"

After the Church service in Part 1, the church kept Michael and I around to try to get us to buy their Dianetics book (aka their bible). We didn't want to give a church that does terrible things for it's members any of our money, so you'll see how that turned out in the video. 

(P.S.) The graph at the end is actually to scale and is an accurate representation of exactly how small scientology actually is.
